in_progress.e1_result: MSS pre-2021 panel H2 directional PASS (rho -0.034/-0.047, not sig). H3b k=1 n=435 (2017→2019 only, 2015 lacks 2013 predecessor), rho=+0.057 wrong direction. H3b k=2 n=0 — needs B8 (#118) for 2013 MSS to populate delta_dynamism_t at edition_t=2015.
in_progress.notes: Key finding: H3b still not confirmed in pre-2021 panel because we lack the 2013 MSS edition for the full 3-edition delta_dynamism_t. B8 is the direct unblock for H3b k=2 coverage.
